title: rhododendron haemaleum var. atrorubrum
intro: Rhododendron haemaleum var. atrorubrum, also known as the yellow-leaved or blood-red rhododendron, is a variety of rhododendron plants that belong to the heath family (Ericaceae) and are native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and it is also known to have antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron haemaleum var. atrorubrum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, and can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions.
